data.title: NEURA Robotics and Amazon Web Services Enter Strategic Collaboration to Accelerate Physical AI at Scale
data.description: In METZINGEN, Germany, NEURA Robotics (NEURA) and Amazon Web Services (AWS) have revealed a strategic partnership aimed at advancing Physical AI on a large scale. This collaboration will facilitate the creation of cognitive robots capable of perceiving, reasoning, and operating alongside humans, moving them from the development phase to global implementation. By merging NEURA's cognitive robotics platform with AWS's cloud and AI capabilities, the companies plan to expedite the training, validation, and deployment of the upcoming cohort of smart robots. This partnership addresses a critical aspect of the tech industry, with a focus on advancing the proliferation of intelligent robots.

data.title: OMRON and Dassault Systèmes Partner to Revolutionize Manufacturing with Virtual and Real Integration
data.description: France-based Dassault Systèmes and Japan-based OMRON have teamed up to connect information technology (IT) and operational technology (OT). This partnership, involving companies listed on Euronext Paris (FR0014003TT8, DSY.PA) and the Tokyo Stock Exchange (TSE:6645), aims to enhance manufacturing processes. By combining their expertise, they plan to assist manufacturers and machine builders in creating and implementing more efficient production systems. This collaboration focuses on designing, simulating, and implementing smarter, more adaptable, and higher-performing systems by integrating IT and OT seamlessly.

data.title: Barnes Molding Solutions Becomes SPECTRIX
data.description: Barnes Molding Solutions, based in Lawrenceville, Ga., has rebranded as SPECTRIX. The new brand combines the injection molding capabilities of their leading brands - Männer, Foboha, Synventive, Priamus, Thermoplay, and Gammaflux. This change, unveiled at Chinaplas 2026, signifies the integration of key technologies under one roof covering part design, material science, hot runner and mold technology, sensors and controls, and injection molding. The transition marks a strategic move towards consolidated operations within the organization.

data.title: RIIG Technology, Inc. (dba HOOTL™) Announces Successful Close of $6M+ Million Series A to Accelerate AI-Driven Healthcare and Infrastructure Solutions
data.description: HOOTL™ (Humans Out of the Loop™), a technology company based in Charlottesville, Virginia, has completed a successful Series A financing round, raising over $6 million.

data.title: Ryobi Systems Establishes a New Investment Management Subsidiary in Singapore
data.description: In December 2025, Ryobi Systems Co., Ltd. launched Ryobi International Investment Pte. Ltd., a new investment management subsidiary based in Singapore. Operations commenced in March 2026, with the goal of driving business expansion through investments in Southeast Asia and strengthening Ryobi Group's worldwide presence. Singapore was chosen as a key location in Asia due to its status as a hub for talent and information within the region. The company aims to leverage this strategic position to facilitate growth and development in the region.

data.title: LG ELECTRONICS SHOWCASES AN EXPANDED BUILT-IN PORTFOLIO WITH SKS AND LG BUILT-IN LINEUPS AT EUROCUCINA 2026
data.description: LG Electronics is enhancing its footprint in the European built-in market by unveiling a comprehensive selection of built-in kitchen solutions under its SKS luxury brand and a new LG Built-in package at EuroCucina 2026. The company is set to exhibit a range of innovative products tailored to the latest design and lifestyle trends in the industry.
Oman condemns any plots aimed at destabilizing the UAE or interfering in its domestic affairs, its Foreign Ministry says.

data.title: Crypto devs worry about legal consequences for publishing software, following recent high-profile convictions, says Coin Center.
data.description: There is growing worry among crypto software developers regarding potential criminal responsibility for releasing their software, sparked by notable convictions in the past year. This has led to increased scrutiny on the legality of software development within the industry.

data.title: Coinbase's x402 AI payments protocol introduces Agentic.market, an app store for AI agents to access AI services.
data.description: The x402 AI payments protocol by Coinbase has introduced Agentic.market, a platform enabling AI agents to find and utilize AI-compatible services.

data.title: NY lawmaker suggests AI dividend funded by AI taxes, equity stakes in AI firms to pay US citizens if automation displaces jobs.
data.description: A new plan is being suggested where a dividend generated by artificial intelligence (AI) would be established. This dividend would be financed through levies on AI utilization and ownership shares in AI enterprises. It aims to compensate American residents in case automation significantly eliminates job opportunities. The proposal intends to provide financial support to individuals who may be impacted by the advancement of AI technology.
Addex's GABAB PAM candidate shows strong anti-cough activity in non-human primate chronic cough model.

data.title: Unaudited financial results of LHV Group for Q1 2026
data.description: In the initial months of 2026, there was robust growth in business activities, although profitability saw a decline due to revenue challenges, reduced contributions from specific subsidiaries, and accelerated operating expenses growth. Despite the difficulties, LHV Group surpassed its financial targets slightly for net income, net profit, and business volumes. The customer count for LHV Group rose to 705,000 customers by the end of the first quarter.

data.title: SIKA EXPANDS ITS ACTIVITIES IN CENTRAL ASIA WITH A NEW NATIONAL SUBSIDIARY IN KYRGYZSTAN
data.description: Sika is expanding its presence in Central Asia with the establishment of a new national subsidiary in Kyrgyzstan. This move brings the company's global network to 103 national subsidiaries, highlighting the strategic importance of the rapidly developing region. The new subsidiary in Bishkek aims to enhance customer relations and facilitate market penetration in a thriving economic landscape. Kyrgyzstan, recognized as one of the fastest-growing economies in Central Asia, is projected to achieve an average annual GDP growth of approximately 7% between 2026 and 2030. The construction sector is a key driver of this growth, fueled by industrial projects and investments in infrastructure and energy initiatives. These endeavors, supported by international financial institutions like the World Bank, offer a steady demand for construction services in the region.

data.title: FDA accepts application for Roche’s Gazyva/Gazyvaro for the treatment of the most common form of lupus
data.description: In Basel on 21 April 2026, Roche disclosed that the US Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has accepted the supplemental Biologics License Application (sBLA) for Gazyva®/Gazyvaro® (obinutuzumab) to treat systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE). The approval was based on encouraging outcomes from the phase III ALLEGORY study, indicating a significant benefit in the primary endpoint of SLE Responder Index 4 (SRI-4) at 52 weeks. This measure evaluates changes in disease severity, symptoms, and physical condition. The FDA is anticipated to decide on the approval by December 2026. Gazyva/Gazyvaro is currently approved for treating lupus nephritis in adults in the US and EU.

data.title: Nord Anglia Education brings the magic of Minecraft to its global family of schools
data.description: Nord Anglia Education, a leading international schools group, has become the first to incorporate Minecraft Education into their classrooms. This innovative move, announced on April 21, 2026, aims to provide students with immersive learning experiences to foster the development of essential life skills. The partnership marks a significant advancement in education, with the potential to impact a large number of students globally.

data.title: Tavira selects Broadridge to Support its Agency Brokerage Platform and Market Connectivity
data.description: Broadridge Financial Solutions Inc., a global Fintech leader, announced on April 21, 2026, that it will be offering its integrated High Touch OMS, connectivity, and middle office capabilities to support Tavira's upcoming growth phase. This partnership aims to provide the necessary scale, automation, and global market access for Tavira. This move signifies Broadridge's commitment to enhancing Tavira's operations and facilitating their expansion.

data.title: Rockwell Automation to Demonstrate Cloud‑Connected Factory Design and Industrial Operations with AWS at Hannover Messe 2026
data.description: In the city of Dusseldorf, Germany, on April 21, 2026, Rockwell Automation, Inc., which trades on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol ROK, will present innovative strategies for factory design and industrial operations at Hannover Messe 2026. Rockwell Automation is globally recognized as the leading company specializing in industrial automation and digital transformation. This showcase event will provide insights into cutting-edge approaches in these fields and is expected to draw significant attention from industry professionals and stakeholders.
SAUDI NATIONAL BANK 1Q PROFIT 6.42B RIYALS, EST. 6.15B RIYALS

data.title: Polkadot price may hit $1.32 before 30% drop risk. Bull trap likely before potential fall to sub-$1.00 in a month.
data.description: Polkadot experienced a minor recovery from oversold levels, reaching resistance at $1.32 which could be a setup for a bull trap. There is a possibility of the next downward movement pushing the value below $1.00 within the next month.
